query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeResponses) as intake_responses_remaining,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments) as intake_files_remaining,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fileAttachments) as file_attachments_remaining,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM organizations) as organizations_remaining;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeResponses) as intake_responses_remaining,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments) as intake_files_remaining,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fileAttachments) as file_attachments_remaining,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM organizations) as organizations_remaining;
